name: Garides Tourkolimano ( Greek Shrimp)
recipeIngredient: 3 Large tomatoes, peeled and cut into wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp. Sprinkle with lemon juice and set aside.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Saute minced garlic, chopped green onion tops, and tomato wedges until fragrant.
4. Add shrimp to the skillet and season with oregano, salt, and pepper.
5. Cook the shrimp, turning frequently, until they turn pink.
6. Stir in crumbled feta cheese and cream sherry. Bring to a boil for 3-4 minutes.
7. Carefully remove the shrimp from the skillet and transfer to a serving dish.
8. Spoon the cheese-sherry mixture over the cooked shrimp.
